title: Build Memory Puzzle Game with Multiple Game Types

requirements.summary: Create a card matching memory game with expandable difficulty grid
acceptanceCriteria: Card grid displays face-down cards that flip on click
Matched pairs remain face-up
Unmatched pairs flip back after brief delay
Grid size increases with difficulty level

file_operations.description: Create card matching game page with grid of flippable cards. Use the generated card-back.dim_200x200.png asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/card-back.dim_200x200.png for card back design. Implement flip animation, match detection, grid size scaling based on difficulty level (4x4 starting, expanding with levels), and game state management including move counter and timer.

Create reusable card grid component that renders responsive grid of card components with configurable dimensions. Handle card flip events, match validation, and visual feedback for matched/unmatched pairs.

Create individual card component with flip animation, face-up/face-down states, and click handler. Reference the generated card-back.dim_200x200.png asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/card-back.dim_200x200.png for the card back visual.

Create custom hook managing card game state including card positions, flip states, match tracking, move counter, and game completion detection. Implement logic for pair matching, card reset after failed match, and difficulty-based grid generation.

requirements.summary: Implement sliding puzzle game with tile rearrangement mechanics
acceptanceCriteria: Grid displays numbered tiles with one empty space
Tiles adjacent to empty space can slide into it
Puzzle is solvable from shuffled starting state
Victory condition detects correct tile order

file_operations.description: Create sliding puzzle game page with numbered tile grid and empty space. Implement tile sliding mechanics, solvable shuffle algorithm, victory detection, move counter, and timer. Grid size scales with difficulty level.
Create tile component displaying number with slide animation. Handle click events for adjacent tiles and visual states for empty space and numbered tiles.

Create custom hook managing sliding puzzle state including tile positions, empty space location, move validation, solvable shuffle generation, and victory condition checking. Implement difficulty-based grid sizing.

requirements.summary: Build pattern memory game with brief display and replication mechanics
acceptanceCriteria: Pattern displays briefly then hides
Player attempts to recreate pattern
System validates player input against original pattern
Pattern complexity increases with level

file_operations.description: Create pattern memory game page with grid for pattern display and input. Use the generated pattern-bg.dim_800x600.png asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/pattern-bg.dim_800x600.png as background visual. Implement timed pattern display, input collection phase, validation logic, and difficulty-based pattern complexity scaling.
Create pattern grid component displaying colored or highlighted cells for memorization. Support both display mode (showing pattern) and input mode (player recreation) with visual feedback.

Create custom hook managing pattern generation, display timing, input collection, validation against original pattern, and difficulty-based complexity scaling (grid size, number of highlighted cells).

requirements.summary: Create sequence memory game with sequential item display and replication
acceptanceCriteria: Sequence displays one item at a time
Player must repeat sequence in correct order
Incorrect order results in failure
Sequence length increases with difficulty

file_operations.description: Create sequence memory game page with sequential item display and player input collection. Implement timed sequence playback, input phase, order validation, visual feedback for correct/incorrect attempts, and difficulty-based sequence length scaling.
Create sequence item component with highlight animation for display phase and clickable state for input phase. Support various visual representations (colors, shapes, numbers).
Create custom hook managing sequence generation, playback timing, input collection, order validation, and difficulty-based sequence length scaling. Track player attempts and provide feedback.

requirements.summary: Implement automatic progressive difficulty system across all puzzle types
acceptanceCriteria: Difficulty level increases after successful puzzle completion
Each puzzle type adjusts appropriately (more cards, larger grids, longer sequences)
Difficulty progression is consistent across game types
System tracks current difficulty level

file_operations.description: Create custom hook managing difficulty progression across all puzzle types. Track current level per puzzle type, implement level-up logic on completion, provide difficulty parameters (grid size, sequence length) based on current level, and persist difficulty state.
Create difficulty configuration utility defining progression parameters for each puzzle type including grid sizes, card counts, sequence lengths, pattern complexity, and timing adjustments per level.

requirements.summary: Add score tracking system with timer and speed/accuracy calculation
acceptanceCriteria: Timer starts when puzzle begins
Score calculated based on completion time and moves/attempts
Scores display after puzzle completion
High scores persist across sessions

file_operations.description: Create custom hook managing game timer with start, pause, stop, and elapsed time tracking. Integrate with backend startTimer method for server-side timestamp synchronization.
Create custom hook calculating scores based on completion time, number of moves/attempts, and difficulty level. Implement scoring formula rewarding speed and accuracy.

Create score display component showing completion time, moves/attempts, calculated score, and high score comparison. Use the generated trophy.dim_64x64.png asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/trophy.dim_64x64.png for high score indicator. Include visual celebrations for new high scores.

Add React Query hooks for fetching player high scores using getPlayerHighScores backend method and mutation hook for completing levels with completeLevel backend method. Invalidate score queries after level completion.

requirements.summary: Create level progress tracking system with persistence
acceptanceCriteria: Current level displays for each puzzle type
Progress indicator shows advancement
Level data persists in backend
Player can view overall progress across all puzzle types

file_operations.description: Create progress tracking component displaying current level, unlocked puzzle types, and overall advancement indicators for all game types. Show visual progress bars or level indicators.

Create dedicated progress page displaying comprehensive player statistics including levels per puzzle type, high scores, completion history, and unlocked content. Fetch data using getPlayerGameState backend method.
Add React Query hook for fetching player game state using getPlayerGameState backend method. Handle loading states and data synchronization for level progress and unlocked puzzles.

requirements.summary: Integrate Internet Identity authentication for secure login
acceptanceCriteria: Login button triggers Internet Identity flow
Authenticated users can save progress
User identity persists across sessions
Logout functionality available

file_operations.description: Update layout header to include Internet Identity login/logout button. Display authenticated user status and show brain-logo.dim_128x128.png from frontend/public/assets/generated/brain-logo.dim_128x128.png as app logo. Use existing useInternetIdentity hook for authentication state and actions.

Create authentication guard component that wraps game pages requiring login. Redirect unauthenticated users to login prompt using useInternetIdentity hook. Allow guest play with warning about unsaved progress.

requirements.summary: Design modern responsive game interface with brain training theme
acceptanceCriteria: Interface is responsive across device sizes
Visual theme conveys brain training and cognitive improvement
Clear navigation between puzzle types
Game controls are intuitive and accessible

file_operations.description: Update CSS variables and Tailwind configuration to implement brain training theme with cognitive improvement color palette (purples, blues, energizing accents). Maintain existing OKLCH color space approach and add brain/puzzle visual motifs.

Update layout component to reflect brain training theme. Replace existing educational app title with 'Brain Puzzle' branding and use brain-logo.dim_128x128.png from frontend/public/assets/generated/brain-logo.dim_128x128.png. Update footer attribution for puzzle game context.

Transform existing landing page into puzzle game selector showing all available puzzle types (Card Matching, Sliding Puzzle, Pattern Memory, Sequence Memory) with visual cards, descriptions, and current level indicators. Add hero section with brain training messaging and cognitive improvement benefits.

Create game type selection card component displaying puzzle type name, description, current level, high score preview, and play button. Use consistent card styling with hover effects and accessibility features.
Create reusable game controls component with pause, restart, hint (where applicable), and quit buttons. Ensure controls are accessible, responsive, and consistently styled across all game types.

Update router configuration to include routes for all puzzle game pages (CardMatchingGame, SlidingPuzzleGame, PatternMemoryGame, SequenceMemoryGame, ProgressPage). Update home route to use new HomePage game selector. Wrap game routes with AuthGuard component for authenticated access.
